violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. - Large ice machine in need of cleaning. Buildup on splash gaurd/ skirt.--Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. - Inside of microwave in need of cleaning. - Fans in walk-in cooler in need of cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Floors, walls, edges, and under equipment could use more frequent cleanings.
Preventing contamination by employees. — --Employee observed handling ready-to-eat food with bare hands. -Line cook preparing a wrap did not have gloves on.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food * (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. 4 crock pots of food in the walk in cooler were not date marked.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Attachments to walls and ceilings (e.g. light fixtures, vent covers, decorations etc..)* were not cleanable and/or maintained in good repair.-The oscillating fan in the kitchen has a build up of lint and requires more frequent cleaning.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
